email_template.subject: Quick question about beard clients
email_template.body:
Hey,

Quick question — when you're doing beard work, do you ever feel like clients underestimate how much precision actually goes into it?

I've been building something for barbers/groomers that helps show clients the detail behind the work while also helping shops bring in more repeat bookings.

Your work stood out, so I wanted to reach out.

If you're open to it, I can send a quick preview.

– Jay
BookerMove
